String.description: Text value enclosed in quotes, used in output tags and filter arguments

Number.description: Numeric value used in math filters, comparisons, and iteration counts

Boolean.description: Logical value for conditions in if/unless/case tags

Nil.description: Represents an empty or undefined value, falsy in boolean contexts

Array.description: Ordered collection of items iterable with for loops and array filters like join, first, last

Hash.description: Object with named properties accessed using dot notation in output tags
